fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Delaware SLP License Requirements — Fees, Board Contact & How to Apply (2026)
seo.description: Complete guide to Delaware speech-language pathologist licensing. Board application fees, Praxis requirements, and telepractice rules for 2026.
seo.keywords: Delaware SLP license, speech-language pathologist Delaware, Delaware speech therapy license

board.name: Board of Speech/Language Pathologists, Audiologists and Hearing Aid Dispensers
board.mailing_address: 861 Silver Lake Blvd., Suite 203, Dover, DE 19904
board.physical_address: 861 Silver Lake Blvd., Suite 203, Dover, DE 19904

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Delaware.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
steps.description: Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited speech-language pathology program.

steps.title: Pass the Praxis Examination
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on the Praxis Examination (test code 5331, score 162).

steps.title: Complete Clinical Fellowship
steps.description: Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice (1,260 hours).

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with fees to the Delaware Division of Professional Regulation.

documents.detail: Score of 162 or higher on test 5331.

telepractice_text: Delaware permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Delaware issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Delaware is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact. SLPs from other compact member states can practice in Delaware through a compact privilege.

faqs.question: How much does a Delaware SLP license cost?
faqs.answer: The total initial cost is approximately $141. Biennial renewal is $111.

faqs.question: Is Delaware part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
faqs.answer: Yes. Delaware has enacted ASLP-IC legislation.

faqs.question: Does Delaware allow telepractice for SLPs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Delaware permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and compact privilege holders.
